measures.name: Generation YoY Growth
measures.expression: VAR _CY = SUM(FactGeneration[MWhGenerated]) VAR _PY = CALCULATE(SUM(FactGeneration[MWhGenerated]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CY - _PY, _PY)

measures.name: Generation MoM Change
measures.expression: VAR _CM = SUM(FactGeneration[MWhGenerated]) VAR _PM = CALCULATE(SUM(FactGeneration[MWhGenerated]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, MONTH)) RETURN _CM - _PM

measures.name: Revenue YoY Growth
measures.expression: VAR _CY = SUM(FactBilling[AmountBilled]) VAR _PY = CALCULATE(SUM(FactBilling[AmountBilled]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CY - _PY, _PY)

measures.name: Emissions YoY Change
measures.expression: VAR _CY = SUM(FactEmissions[CO2eTons]) VAR _PY = CALCULATE(SUM(FactEmissions[CO2eTons]), DATEADD(DimDate[Date], -1, YEAR)) RETURN DIVIDE(_CY - _PY, _PY)
